pages.text:
ZITZEAR SHAMIR

VICE PREMIER

and

MINISTER OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

FO ALL TO WHOM THESE PRESENTS SHALL COME BE

IT KNOWN

HEREAS a Convention on the Metex was signed at Paris on 20 May 1875 and modified at sèvres on 6 October 1921;

AND WHEREAS under Article III Of the Modified Convention of 1921 the

State of Israel is entitled to accede to the sald Conyention;

AND WHEREAS on 10 March 1985, the government of the state of Israel, in accordance with the powers vested in it by la, decided to approve the accession of Israel to the said Conventions

NOW THEREFORE, by these presents, it is declared that the Government of the state of Israel accedes to the conyention on the Meter, signed at Paris on 20 May 1875, and modified at sèyres on 6 October 1921,

IN WITNESS WHEREOF I, Kitzhak Shamir, Vice Premier and Minister of

Foreign Affairs, have subscribed my signature and have caused the Seal of the Ministry of Forelgn Affairs to be affixed hereunto, at Jerusalem, this Iwenty Seventh day of Adar, Five Thousand Seven Fundred and Forty

Five, which corresponds to the Iwentieth day of March, One Thousand

Nine Hundred and sighty Five.

Inscribed in the Fifth Book of Pratocol Under No. 1502.
